system.notes:
Corrupt Fixer, Old Money

Her family built Ironhook Prison. Her wealth is built on generations of shady deals with incarcerated aristocrats and business owners. She sees the world as a rigged game and has contempt for anyone who finds corruption shocking or fixable. She is vain, practical, and ruthless.

She hires outsiders to carry out promises she made to inmates. Her family has casually wrecked reputations and lives over centuries, and that leaves a trail of vengeance seekers.
